ssil_bridge_pass_id_reserved: RXGD_PASS_SSIL_BLUR (3) is NOT wired in this slice (keeps its historical placeholder path)

godot_hook_investigation.note: Investigation only; external/godot-master is NOT modified. Paths and functions are recorded for the patch 0014 call-site gate and the patch 0015 native-handle mapping.

effect_class.native_pass_shape: compute dispatch chain: blur_passes (default 2) x 4 deinterleaved slices, ping-pong between RB_DEINTERLEAVED and RB_DEINTERLEAVED_PONG (R8G8_UNORM)

call_sites.note: patch 0014 gates the whole blur loop; the SSIL Edge Aware Blur block (L929-996) is not wired.

godot_hook_investigation.source_resource: ao_deinterleaved_slices[i] / ao_pong_slices[i] ping-pong (RB_SCOPE_SSAO RB_DEINTERLEAVED / RB_DEINTERLEAVED_PONG, R8G8_UNORM, x=ssao value y=packed edges; ss_effects.cpp L1123-1124, L1340-1369)
godot_hook_investigation.dest_resource: opposite ping-pong slice bound as rg8 storage image (set 1 binding 0 of ssao_blur.glsl)

descriptor_mapping.dst_shape: dst extent == src extent (1:1 ping-pong blur at the deinterleaved slice size; same rule as GRX-010's full-res tonemap)

supported_math_subset.variant: MODE_SMART (SSAO_BLUR_PASS_SMART), single blur pass on a single deinterleaved slice
supported_math_subset.edge_weights: unpack_edges (packed byte -> 4x 2-bit LRTB / 3.0) + edge_sharpness, clamped to [0,1]
supported_math_subset.kernel_shape: edge-aware 3x3 cross (center weight 0.5 + L/R/T/B weighted by unpacked edges), result = sum / sum_weight
supported_math_subset.edges_channel: packed edges passthrough in the second channel; z/w written 0
supported_math_subset.border: clamp addressing (interior texels are texel-exact vs Godot's half-pixel gather)
supported_math_subset.half_screen_pixel_size: carried in b0 for SSAOBlurPushConstant shape parity; unused by the Load-addressed kernel

known_gaps: MODE_SMART single pass only; MODE_WIDE (+-2 texel cross, bidirectional edge products, 0.8 base weight) unsupported
multi-pass ping-pong chain unscheduled (ssao_blur_passes default 2; wide passes for pass < blur_passes-2)
4-slice deinterleaved loop unscheduled (kernel covers one slice per dispatch)
SSIL blur unsupported (ssil_blur.glsl: rgba16 value image + separate r8 edges image; RXGD_PASS_SSIL_BLUR not wired)
mirror-sampler border addressing not reproduced (kernel clamps at the border; border texels may differ)
rg8 unorm storage quantization not modelled (kernel computes float values; native slices are R8G8_UNORM)
gather-vs-load half-pixel addressing seam outside interior texels
no temporal/noise stability evidence (GRX-011 plan note; 4g-level, later slice)
GPU-side math parity observation pending a real dispatch (math_parity_evidence.json)

compile_blockers.summary: the canonical ssao_blur package is the owner-approved hlsl_bridge_workaround artifact (DXC cs_6_0 container validated by dxv, per-slot texture2d/rwtexture2d binding kinds, Rurix-owned RTS0; GRX-009 texture_artifact_provenance_policy.json applies to every texture compute pass); a rurixc-owned ssao_blur compile still requires a patched llc that supports texture intrinsics plus multi-channel texture element support in the Rurix Texture2D<F>/RWTexture2D<F> lang items

implementation_status.runtime_state_note: The DEFAULT runtime path stays fallback-only: with all per-pass settings at their false defaults the bridge still returns RXGD_STATUS_FALLBACK for RXGD_PASS_SSAO_BLUR and the native Godot SSAO blur ping-pong chain renders. real_gpu_pass=true / real_d3d12_dispatch_recorded=true record the strict MEASURED success of the opt-in real-pass arm (dispatch_real_pass under a d3d12-recording-shim bridge on the 0001..0016 scratch build); it is not a default enablement and carries no performance claim. The shipping feature-off bridge still fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked, and the patch 0016 result writeback is a SCAFFOLD (native Godot SSAO blur stays the continuation/backstop and re-renders the full blur_passes x 4-slice ping-pong chain every frame, so the candidate image cannot change and no net benefit exists yet). No estimated ssao_blur GPU time is attributed; RXGD_PASS_SSIL_BLUR keeps its historical placeholder path (not wired in this slice).
implementation_status.bridge_gate: src/rurix-godot SsaoBlurGate: preflight (int64 cap, 2 texture resources, 28-byte b0, dims match, 1:1 dst shape) -> dispatch eligibility (RXGD_CAP_SSAO_BLUR_REAL_PASS opt-in, non-null native handles, SsaoBlurDispatchPackage layout/digest match vs offline evidence) -> per-slot kernel-binding-kind conformance ([texture2d, rwtexture2d]) -> math-parity gate (smart_blur_cpu_reference_proven_pending_gpu_dispatch) -> real dispatch only under the d3d12-recording-shim feature; every failure records a fallback reason and prints the once-per-session RXGD_SSAO_BLUR_REAL_PASS_BLOCKED diagnostic
implementation_status.godot_module_patch: spike/godot-rurix/patches/0014-rurix-accel-ssao-blur-pass-gate-and-callsite.patch (stacked on 0001..0013; default-false rendering/rurix_accel/passes/ssao_blur/enabled setting, try_record_ssao_blur() module gate, default-false virtual D3D12Hooks::try_record_ssao_blur(), and the Edge-Aware Blur call-site opt-in gate in ss_effects.cpp generate_ssao; the native SSAO blur loop is always preserved as fallback). The runtime native-handle binding is patch 0015-rurix-accel-ssao-blur-runtime-resource-binding.patch and the recording-smoke + real-pass opt-in arms are patch 0016-rurix-accel-ssao-blur-recording-smoke-and-real-pass-optin.patch

wired_call_sites.note: opt-in gate calls D3D12Hooks::try_record_ssao_blur() before the native blur loop in generate_ssao (patch 0014; applyability verified via git apply --check on a scratch copy). The SSIL blur block is not wired.

standalone_d3d12_dispatch_smoke.purpose: Prove the tracked offline ssao_blur DXIL container + RTS0 root signature + descriptor layout can complete one minimal compute dispatch on a real D3D12 device/command queue AND that every measured GPU texel matches the CPU reference (edge-aware smart blur on a deterministic synthetic slice) within tolerance. Standalone measured evidence only; the bridge records no dispatch and returns no OK.
does_not_imply: Godot runtime SSAO blur pass completion
any visual diff, measured fallback telemetry, temporal stability, or performance claim

real_pass_measured_success.real_gpu_pass_scope: opt_in_only: the measured real dispatch requires the default-false dispatch_real_pass arm plus a d3d12-recording-shim bridge DLL; the default runtime path stays fallback-only and the shipping feature-off bridge fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked
real_pass_measured_success.pass_enable_matrix: three legs measured: disabled_default (reference) / enabled_real_pass_optin (candidate, real_pass_marker + writeback_marker observed) / forced_capability_downgrade (RXGD_SSAO_BLUR_REAL_PASS_BLOCKED first_missing_prerequisite=runtime_binding_preflight_failed fallback_reason=unsupported_device)
real_pass_measured_success.ldr_visual_gate: max_abs=0 / mean_abs=0 (candidate is bit-exact to the reference because the writeback is a scaffold and the native ping-pong continuation still renders)
real_pass_measured_success.writeback: patch 0016 result writeback scaffold: the MODE_SMART single-pass single-slice edge-aware blur result is dispatched into the real Godot deinterleaved ping-pong slice while the native Godot SSAO blur still runs the full blur_passes x 4-slice ping-pong chain as continuation/backstop, so the image cannot change (1:1 MODE_SMART single-slice subset of the native chain) and no net benefit exists yet

remaining_segments: MODE_WIDE / MODE_NON_SMART variants beyond MODE_SMART single-pass single-slice
multi-pass ping-pong chain (ssao_blur_passes default 2) and the 4-slice deinterleaved loop scheduling
SSIL blur (RXGD_PASS_SSIL_BLUR: rgba16 value image + separate r8 edges image) wiring
mirror-sampler border addressing and rg8 unorm storage quantization parity
raster/compute ping-pong output seam design (native runs the full 4-slice chain; this kernel writes a single slice per dispatch) or native-continuation retirement
per-pass FPS baseline comparison (contract requires >= 0.95x baseline before any default-enable discussion)

evidence_requirements.visual: in-engine LDR absolute diff (GRX-009 segment 4g template) recorded by the real-pass enablement smoke: reference (disabled) vs candidate (opt-in real pass) vs forced-fallback frames, all within the pinned thresholds (max_abs<=2, mean_abs<=0.25); measured max_abs=0/mean_abs=0 because the writeback is a scaffold and the native continuation renders
evidence_requirements.perf: reuse GRX-006 baseline/perf gate; no perf improvement claimed

disclaimer: GRX-011 ssao_blur is closed out at the stage-A5-equivalent level (mirroring GRX-010 tonemap): the ssao_blur pass contract, the DXC/DXV/RTS0 offline kernel package (hlsl_bridge_workaround provenance, runtime-mappable per the owner-approved GRX-009 texture artifact provenance policy), the fail-closed bridge SsaoBlurGate (default RXGD_STATUS_FALLBACK; opt-in RXGD_CAP_SSAO_BLUR_REAL_PASS arm), the Godot patch stack 0001..0016 (patches 0014-0016: per-pass settings default false + call-site opt-in gate + runtime native-handle binding + recording-smoke/real-pass opt-in; native SSAO blur ping-pong chain always preserved), the standalone real D3D12 dispatch smoke, and the gated real-pass enablement gate that recorded a strict MEASURED success (real_pass_enablement_success_evidence.json, strict_success=true). implemented=true / real_gpu_pass=true / real_d3d12_dispatch_recorded=true record the MEASURED opt-in real-pass arm only. The DEFAULT path stays fallback-only, default_enable_state stays disabled per the owner decision (real_pass_default_enable_decision.json, keep_default_disabled), the shipping feature-off bridge still fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked, RXGD_PASS_SSIL_BLUR stays unwired, the patch 0016 writeback is a SCAFFOLD (native Godot SSAO blur continuation/backstop; candidate image bit-exact), and NO visual-superiority, temporal-stability, GPU-timestamp, FPS, or performance improvement is claimed.
